goal: Fix the ChatGPT -> GitHub -> OpenClaw search-task flow so ChatGPT can create a branch-first task and dispatch it without writing task placeholders to main.

params.codex_prompt: Work only in 2133611700c-sudo/opencloud-gpt-agent. Fix the canonical ChatGPT -> GitHub -> OpenClaw flow for search tasks. Requirements: (1) branch-first operation: task and dispatch files must be created on an existing non-main branch before execution; no placeholder writes to main; (2) preserve current public, standard ubuntu-latest, free Actions model; (3) do not create a second control plane; (4) make job_lead_collect/search tasks produce auditable result JSON and markdown evidence; (5) keep fail-closed behavior; (6) add or update tests proving branch-only search dispatch; (7) remove any accidental test task/dispatch files added to main during ChatGPT testing, but do not delete legitimate architecture files; (8) do not merge; (9) open or update a PR to main; (10) final report must include changed files, tests, workflow run id, result file, and any remaining blocker. Do not touch USCIS Helper, Vercel, or unrelated products.
